markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick-off for the Vizcom \<\> GrowthX content strategy engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Shift:** Vizcom will balance its content across its core verticals (automotive, footwear, apparel, industrial design) to broaden its appeal beyond its current niche, which is perceived as too narrow.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [**Core Differentiator:** Vizcom enables "OG product designers" to iterate hundreds of designs quickly for physical products, a key advantage over general-purpose AI tools that lack real-world consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [**Primary Bottleneck:** Growth is constrained by a lack of strategic content. The current strategy fails to capture UGC or convert high-quality video assets into indexed, site-driving content.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=2848.0)
  - [**Key Objection:** Security and IP ownership are major concerns. Vizcom's response is a strict "no training on user data" policy and clear user ownership of their designs.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=2135.0)

## Topics

### The Challenge: Unfocused Content & Narrow Perception

  - [**Problem:** Vizcom's content strategy lacks focus, SEO/ADO, and a clear conversion path, failing to capture the value of its high-quality UGC.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [**Perception Gap:** The brand is seen as a niche tool for footwear and automotive, a legacy of the founders' backgrounds. This perception is a barrier to growth in other key verticals.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [**Strategic Goal:** Rebalance content across all verticals to reflect the full scope of Vizcom's capabilities and target audience.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

### The Solution: A Tool for "OG Product Designers"

  - [**Core Value Prop:** Vizcom is a professional design tool for physical products ("pixel to atoms"), not a general-purpose AI art generator.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [**Key Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
      - [**Multimodal Input:** Unique ability to combine live sketching, image uploads, and material swatches in a non-linear workflow, enabling deep iteration.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
      - [**Real-World Consistency:** AI trained on hard materials ensures consistency across generations, a critical feature for tangible product design that competitors lack.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=2019.0)
  - [**Customer Archetypes:**](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
      - [**Designers (IC):** The primary users, valuing the ability to iterate hundreds of designs quickly.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
      - [**Leadership (Decision-Makers):** Creative Directors, GMs who value efficiency and reduced COGS.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Marketers:** Stakeholders involved in feedback and reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
      - [**IT/Procurement:** Need security materials to unblock deals.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)

### The Market: Competing on Breadth, Not Niche

  - [**Competitive Landscape:** Vizcom has no single direct competitor but competes with specialized tools in each vertical.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
      - [**Apparel:** Raspberry AI, Clo (CLO).](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
      - [**Automotive:** Rhino.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
      - [**General AI:** Kriya (Vizcom differentiates by focusing on professional design over "dopamine hits").](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [**Win/Loss Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
      - [**Wins:** High win rate in core verticals (industrial design, footwear) due to superior real-world material rendering.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
      - [**Losses:** Struggles in apparel, as competitors are trained on soft materials (fabric) from the start.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)

### The Obstacle: Security & IP Ownership

  - [**Primary Objection:** Prospects are highly concerned about data security and intellectual property (IP) ownership.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=2135.0)
  - [**Vizcom's Response:**](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=2135.0)
      - [**Security:** No training on user-generated data. Workspaces are isolated to prevent cross-client data exposure.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=2249.0)
      - [**Ownership:** Users own their designs. Vizcom may request permission for promotional use of public work but negotiates this out of enterprise contracts.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=2317.0)

### The Path Forward: Content-Led Growth

  - [**Current Growth Channels:** Primarily PLG pull-through (referrals, self-discovery) and events.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=2389.0)
  - [**Website Migration:** Moving from Framer to Webflow (target: early Dec). This creates a fresh opportunity to implement a strategic content plan.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [**New Team SKU:** A "team SKU" is planned for H1 2025 to serve small teams (2-3 users) who are currently forced into the enterprise sales motion, creating unnecessary friction.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=2485.0)
  - [**Success Metrics (6 months):**](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=2995.0)
      - [Increased content-driven conversions (sign-ups & paid).](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=2995.0)
      - [Uplift in UGC and community collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=2995.0)
      - [Improved search visibility and rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=2995.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Emily:**](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=3261.0)
      - [Share ICP archetypes by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
      - [Upload all existing marketing docs to the Notion workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
      - [Grant Google Search Console & Analytics access.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=3261.0)
      - [Coordinate a product deep-dive with a Vizcom expert.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=3383.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=3510.0)
      - [Deliver the "What We Heard" recap document.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=3510.0)
      - [Develop and share core artifacts: Company Brief, Audience Personas, and Writing Guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=3510.0)
      - [Schedule the weekly touchpoint.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=3540.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=3540.0)
      - [Meet next week to discuss topic clusters and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/4EbF3shxiKDDMwua7vUZ7bLPUXKCwx_t?tab=summary&timestamp=3540.0)
